mentions.note: 2026 inflection year: $150M digital games investment, two major movie releases (Masters of the Universe), 3–6% growth guidance; CEO bought $1M stock; 18% buyback in 3 years signals undervaluation; balance sheet strong.
CEO Ynon Kreiz buying shares; stock sells at 11x earnings; toy business out of favor but bottoming; insider conviction provides strong buy signal.
